zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Hooton於大約1364年出生在英國爾胡頓時，她的父親Sir William Hooton40歲，母親Katherine Torond15歲。她於1385年與Sir William de Stanley IV在英國爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1428年2月2日在她的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Hooton于大约1364年出生在英国爾胡頓时，她的父亲Sir William Hooton40岁，母亲Katherine Torond15岁。她于1385年与Sir William de Stanley IV在英国爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1428年2月2日在她的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hooton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hooton Levitt, Hooton Pagnell, Hooton Roberts, or Slade Hooton (all Yorkshire), or Hooton (Cheshire). The placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Hooton was born about 1364, in Hooton, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir William Hooton, was 40 and her mother, Katherine Torond, was 15. She married Sir William de Stanley IV in 1385, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 2 February 1428, in her hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Hooton est née environ 1364, à Hooton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Hooton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Katherine Torond, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Stanley IV en 1385, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1428, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.Houghton Manor, West Houghton, Nr Ellesm: Ellesmere Port, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Hooton um 1364 in Hooton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Hooton 40 und ihre Mutter Katherine Torond 15. Sie hat 1385 in Cheshire, England Sir William de Stanley IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Februar 1428 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Sir William de Stanley IV nel 1385, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 2 febbraio 1428, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Hootonが約1364年にイギリスチェシュアイアホーオトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Hootonは40歳，母Katherine Torondは15歳であった。1385年にイギリスチェシュアイアでSir William de Stanley IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1428年2月2日に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Hooton(이)가 대략 1364년 영국 체실르 후턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Hooton(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Torond(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1385년 영국 체실르에서 Sir William de Stanley IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1428년 2월 2일 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Hooton nasceu aproximadamente 1364, em Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Hooton, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Torond, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Stanley IV em 1385, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1428, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ro.Houghton Manor, West Houghton, Nr Ellesm: Ellesmere Port, Cheshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Hooton родилась около 1364 г. в местности хутон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Hooton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Torond, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Stanley IV в 1385 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 2 февраля 1428 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

Se casó con Sir William de Stanley IV en 1385, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1428, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
